mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 026 > npcs > CHARACTER CREATION options for minimizing or eliminating the
mechanics.excerpt: CHARACTER CREATION options for minimizing or eliminating the randomness of events_ The most extreme option is to disregard events during char- acter creation_ Ihis does not mean rolling for events and ignoring only the negative ones, however: players should either use the events as described for their characters Or forgo them completely: Alternatively; enterprising players can tailor existing events t0 suit their Own tastes_ If the player has definite story in mind for his character.
